prompt: A clean, modern editorial fashion portrait of a young woman standing confidently against a vibrant sky-blue gradient background. She wears an oversized camel-brown blazer over a cobalt blue crew-neck shirt, with a relaxed fit and minimalist styling. Soft natural daylight illuminates her face, creating smooth skin, subtle highlights, and gentle shadows. She has a calm, friendly expression with a slight smile, looking directly into the camera. Behind her head is a large hand-drawn circular halo made of thin white or pastel pink geometric doodle lines, giving a playful celestial effect. White sketch outlines trace the edges of her blazer and clothing, blending illustration with photography. Floating pastel smiley-face stickers, tiny sparkling stars, abstract blue organic shapes, and delicate scribble lines are scattered throughout the composition. The design mixes realistic portrait photography with whimsical graphic elements, creating a cheerful, creative, Gen Z editorial aesthetic. Color palette: sky blue, cyan, camel brown, cobalt blue, white, blush pink. Minimalist composition, centered framing, clean negative space, ultra-realistic facial details, soft cinematic lighting, high-end fashion campaign, graphic design overlay, modern branding aesthetic, crisp focus, premium quality, Adobe Illustrator-inspired doodle accents, magazine cover style, 8K resolution.
